query:
SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS viewer_count,
            COALESCE(SUM(play_count), 0) AS total_plays,
            COALESCE(SUM(completed_count), 0) AS completed_plays,
            COALESCE(SUM(total_seconds_watched), 0) AS total_seconds_watched
         FROM video_watch_aggregates
         WHERE video_id = ?
